decision_item: Future nominal PED/FED rates by scenario
dashboard_treatment: Recompute PED revenue from repo-vendored VKT per capita, population, source-backed litres intensity and FED rate paths.
why_needed: Converts PED litres to nominal revenue and affects retail petrol-price scenarios.
recommended_resolution: Add explicit nominal rate paths to reviewed scenario workbooks or a governed rate table; keep Crown top-up separate.

decision_item: Future nominal effective Light/Heavy RUC rates
dashboard_treatment: Recompute Light/Heavy RUC revenue from repo-vendored net-km rows and source-derived effective rates; keep independent nominal rate tables as a provenance limitation.
why_needed: Converts net km into revenue; Heavy RUC is class-mix weighted.
recommended_resolution: Provide scenario/year effective average rate paths with source and class-mix assumptions.

decision_item: PED bridge source history and re-estimation
dashboard_treatment: Use the repo-vendored PED bridge rows for population, total VKT and source-backed litres intensity; do not infer missing training-history rows from validation forecasts.
why_needed: The current app pack reports ped_bridge_source_history_missing.
recommended_resolution: Use accrual PED revenue/base-rate history from 2008Q3 onward; replay Table 3.3 and re-estimate on current data with rolling validation.

decision_item: Pass-through policy for LPG, CNG, FED refunds, MVR and TUC
linked_artifacts: release_registry.csv; source_gap_register.csv; pass-through value table not vendored
dashboard_treatment: Use explicit source rows where present and show missing release-value paths instead of fabricating pass-through totals.
why_needed: Only PED/Light/Heavy RUC are directly modeled; Total NLTF requires the other lines.
recommended_resolution: Use an explicit MOT release path where available; otherwise use a governed assumption with status and source.

dashboard_treatment: Keep gross, admin, refunds and net basis as separate governed series where source rows exist.
why_needed: The workbook scales modeled RUC components to the official net-of-admin/refunds basis.
recommended_resolution: Store gross, admin, refunds and net as separate canonical series and calculate the selected basis explicitly.

dashboard_treatment: Persist Include/Exclude selection and warn when Include is requested without governed top-up value rows.
why_needed: Temporary relief changes benchmark actuals and total comparisons.
recommended_resolution: Keep an Include/Exclude control and persist the choice in the run manifest.

dashboard_treatment: Label H1-H12 as backtest-supported and H13+ as long-range extrapolation or assumption; no value changes.
why_needed: Econometric performance is validated to 12 quarters while the workbook projects to 2050.
recommended_resolution: Label H1–H12 backtest-supported and H13+ long-range extrapolation/assumption.
